headline: S&P 500 on Track to End Month With Sharp Loss
summary: The S&P 500's March has been mostly miserable. The broad stock benchmark is down about 7% for the month, on pace for its largest one month percentage decline since Sept. 2022, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

raw.headline: S&P 500 on Track to End Month With Sharp Loss
raw.summary: The S&P 500's March has been mostly miserable. The broad stock benchmark is down about 7% for the month, on pace for its largest one month percentage decline since Sept. 2022, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

headline: S&P Poised to End Month With Sharp Loss
summary: The S&P 500's March has been mostly miserable. The broad stock benchmark is down about 6.5% for the month, on pace for its largest one month percentage decline since Sept. 2022, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

raw.headline: S&P Poised to End Month With Sharp Loss
raw.summary: The S&P 500's March has been mostly miserable. The broad stock benchmark is down about 6.5% for the month, on pace for its largest one month percentage decline since Sept. 2022, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

headline: Not Worried About an Oil Shock? Chevron CEO, Other Energy Execs Sure Are.
summary: An uncomfortable reality settled in this past week: There is no clear way to return the energy industry to its pre-Iran War state anytime soon.  High  oil prices  look like they’re here to stay and could stretch into 2027.  “The window during which you could have restarted flows, and the market goes back to normal in weeks or a month, closed pretty quickly within the first week,” said Karim Fawaz, who leads S&P Global’s energy advisory service.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

raw.headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Brush Off

headline: Thursday’s Market Rout: By the Numbers
summary: As the war drags on and investors lose faith in a quick resolution, pain in financial markets is mounting. On Thursday:  The Nasdaq Composite Index slipped into a correction, now 10.6% off its alltime high last October.

raw.headline: Thursday’s Market Rout: By the Numbers
raw.summary: As the war drags on and investors lose faith in a quick resolution, pain in financial markets is mounting. On Thursday:  The Nasdaq Composite Index slipped into a correction, now 10.6% off its alltime high last October.

summary: Streamex Corp. ("Streamex" or the "Company") (NASDAQ:STEX) today issued a statement to clarify and formally refute a series of third-party posts attributed to S&P Capital IQ and displayed on MarketScreener on March

headline: AGI Bust, AI Boom: Why AI's Winners And Losers Aren't Who You Think
summary: The market overvalues AGI as LLMs plateau, but BRK.A and UNH leverage AI for gains while others face bubble risks. Find out why TRI, SPGI, and MCO are also so vital.

headline: Foreign investors pull a record $12 billion from Indian stocks, sparked by Iran war
summary: Foreign investors are pulling out a record $12 billion from Indian equities as the Iran conflict drives up energy costs and raises doubts on economic growth.

raw.headline: Foreign investors pull a record $12 billion from Indian stocks, sparked by Iran war
